name: kinora-sdk
description: An open source typescript SDK, compatible with node and browser, for instantiating and automating encrypted on-chain Quests with video social LivePeer metrics.

scripts.demo: npm run yalc-clean && npm run dev
scripts.yalc-clean: cd demo && yalc remove kinora-sdk && cd .. && yalc installations clean kinora-sdk && rm -rf dist && npm run build && yalc publish --replace && cd demo && yalc add kinora-sdk && cd ..
scripts.install-demo: cd demo && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json .env && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: npm run install-demo && npm run copy-env && npm run start-demo
